tasks.title: Dataset Preparation and Model Training Infrastructure
tasks.description: Prepare comprehensive MIDI datasets and establish model training infrastructure for AI music generation

subtasks.title: MIDI Dataset Collection and Curation

subtasks.title: Model Training Pipeline Setup

subtasks.details: Configure CUDA environment, implement distributed training support, create model checkpointing system, setup TensorBoard monitoring

subtasks.title: Music Quality Evaluation Metrics
subtasks.description: Develop objective and subjective evaluation metrics for generated music
subtasks.details: Implement musical coherence scoring, harmonic progression validation metrics, rhythm consistency measurement, create A/B testing framework

tasks.title: Text Prompt Analysis Module
tasks.description: Create a natural language processing module to parse text prompts and extract musical parameters including genre, mood, tempo, and key information
tasks.details: Develop the GenreAnalyzer and related components to process text prompts. Implement NLP techniques to identify musical attributes from user input. Support parsing of explicit parameters (e.g., '120 BPM', 'C major') and implicit descriptions (e.g., 'upbeat summer vibes'). Create a robust parameter extraction system that maps text descriptions to musical values.
tasks.testStrategy: Create unit tests with diverse prompt examples covering edge cases. Validate parameter extraction accuracy against a labeled dataset of music descriptions. Test integration with the MIDI generation pipeline.

subtasks.title: Implement NLP Tokenization and Text Processing

subtasks.details: Create tokenization system for musical text, implement stemming/lemmatization for music terms, build vocabulary mapping for genres, moods, and musical concepts.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests with various text inputs and validation of tokenization accuracy

subtasks.title: Create Genre and Mood Classification System
subtasks.description: Develop machine learning models to classify genre and mood from processed text tokens
subtasks.details: Train classification models on music description datasets, implement confidence scoring, handle multi-genre and complex mood combinations.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test classification accuracy against labeled datasets and edge cases

subtasks.title: Build Tempo and Key Extraction Engine
subtasks.description: Extract specific musical parameters like BPM and key signatures from text descriptions
subtasks.details: Implement regex patterns for explicit musical parameters, create inference algorithms for implicit tempo/key hints, validate extracted parameters against musical constraints.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test extraction accuracy with various explicit and implicit parameter descriptions

subtasks.title: Implement Caching and Optimization Layer
subtasks.description: Add Redis-based caching for processed prompts and implement batch processing
subtasks.details: Cache tokenization results, implement prompt similarity detection, enable batch processing for multiple requests, optimize spaCy pipeline for speed

tasks.title: Neural Network Architecture for MIDI Generation
tasks.description: Design and implement the core AI model using TensorFlow/PyTorch that generates 4-bar MIDI snippets for different instruments and song sections
tasks.details: Build the deep learning architecture that takes extracted musical parameters and generates appropriate MIDI patterns. Implement hybrid LSTM+Transformer architecture with VAE components for creative generation. Support multi-track generation (drums, bass, chords, melody) with attention mechanisms to maintain musical coherence between tracks.
tasks.testStrategy: Train model with diverse music datasets, validate generated MIDI quality, test multi-track coherence, benchmark generation speed

subtasks.title: Design LSTM-Transformer Hybrid Architecture
subtasks.description: Create the core neural network architecture combining LSTM memory with Transformer attention
subtasks.details: Implement hybrid model with LSTM for temporal sequence modeling and Transformer attention for long-range dependencies. Design multi-head attention mechanism for track relationships.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for model architecture, gradient flow validation, memory usage benchmarks

subtasks.title: Implement Multi-Track Generation System
subtasks.description: Build system for generating synchronized MIDI tracks for different instruments
subtasks.details: Create separate model heads for drums, bass, chords, and melody generation. Implement cross-track attention to ensure musical coherence between parts.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test multi-track synchronization, validate musical coherence between generated parts

subtasks.title: Add VAE Components for Creative Diversity
subtasks.description: Integrate Variational Autoencoder components to enable creative variation in generated patterns

subtasks.testStrategy: Test generation diversity, validate latent space interpolation, measure creative quality

subtasks.title: Implement Model Evaluation Suite
subtasks.description: Create comprehensive evaluation system for generated MIDI quality

Implement harmonic progression rules, rhythm pattern validation, voice leading constraints, and genre-specific musical conventions. Create post-processing filters that can adjust generated content to meet musical standards.

tasks.title: Develop Virtual Instrument Matching System
tasks.description: Create a system that automatically selects and applies appropriate virtual instruments (VSTs) to the generated MIDI tracks based on genre and mood.
tasks.details:
Build a VST matching system that maps generated MIDI tracks to appropriate virtual instruments in Ableton Live:

1. Create a database of VST instruments categorized by genre, mood, and instrument type
2. Implement a matching algorithm that selects VSTs based on the song's genre/mood
3. Develop preset selection logic for each VST based on the track's characteristics
4. Integrate with Ableton Live to automatically load selected VSTs
5. Support both built-in Ableton instruments and external VST plugins

Database schema:
```sql
CREATE TABLE vst_presets (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    name TEXT,
    instrument_type TEXT,  -- 'drums', 'bass', 'keys', 'synth', etc.
    genre TEXT,
    mood TEXT,
    vst_name TEXT,
    preset_path TEXT,
    parameters JSON
);
```

Matching algorithm:
```python
class VSTMatcher:
    def __init__(self, db_connection):
        self.db = db_connection
        self.ableton = AbletonInterface()
        
    def find_matching_vst(self, track_type, genre, mood):
        # Query database for appropriate VST preset
        query = """SELECT * FROM vst_presets 
                  WHERE instrument_type = ? AND genre = ? AND mood = ?
                  ORDER BY relevance DESC LIMIT 1"""
        result = self.db.execute(query, (track_type, genre, mood)).fetchone()
        return result
        
    def apply_vst_to_track(self, track_id, midi_data, genre, mood):
        track_type = self.determine_track_type(midi_data)
        vst_preset = self.find_matching_vst(track_type, genre, mood)
        
        # Load VST into Ableton track
        self.ableton.load_instrument(track_id, vst_preset['vst_name'])
        self.ableton.load_preset(track_id, vst_preset['preset_path'])
        
        # Apply custom parameters if needed
        if vst_preset['parameters']:
            self.ableton.set_parameters(track_id, vst_preset['parameters'])
            
        return vst_preset['id']
```

Utilize the existing Ableton Live integration to load instruments and presets.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Unit tests for VST database queries (verify correct instrument selection)
2. Integration tests with Ableton Live (confirm VSTs load correctly)
3. Test genre-to-instrument mappings (verify jazz gets appropriate instruments)
4. Test mood-based preset selection (confirm 'sad' gets appropriate sounds)
5. Performance testing (VST loading time should be under 5 seconds per track)
6. Test with edge cases (unusual genre combinations, extreme moods)
7. Verify compatibility with both built-in and external VSTs

subtasks.title: Enhance VST Database Schema
subtasks.details:
Extended schema:
```sql
CREATE TABLE vst_presets (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    name TEXT,
    instrument_type TEXT,
    genre TEXT,
    mood TEXT,
    vst_name TEXT,
    preset_path TEXT,
    cpu_usage REAL,  -- NEW: CPU 사용률
    latency INTEGER,  -- NEW: 레이턴시
    frequency_range TEXT,  -- NEW: 주파수 범위
    polyphony INTEGER,  -- NEW: 동시 발음 수
    tags TEXT,  -- NEW: 검색용 태그
    user_rating REAL,  -- NEW: 사용자 평점
    parameters JSON
);

CREATE INDEX idx_vst_performance ON vst_presets(cpu_usage, latency);
CREATE INDEX idx_vst_tags ON vst_presets(tags);
```

tasks.title: Implement Automatic Effects Chain System
tasks.description: Develop a system that automatically applies appropriate effect chains to each track based on instrument type, genre, and mood.
tasks.details:
Create an effects chain automation system that applies appropriate audio effects to each track:

1. Build a database of effect chain templates for different track types and genres
2. Implement an algorithm to select and customize effect chains based on track characteristics
3. Develop parameter adjustment logic for each effect (reverb time, delay feedback, etc.)
4. Integrate with Ableton Live to automatically add and configure effects
5. Support common effect types: EQ, compression, reverb, delay, etc.

Database schema:
```sql
CREATE TABLE effect_chains (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    name TEXT,
    track_type TEXT,  -- 'drums', 'bass', 'keys', etc.
    genre TEXT,
    mood TEXT
);

CREATE TABLE effect_parameters (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    chain_id INTEGER,
    effect_type TEXT,  -- 'reverb', 'delay', 'eq', etc.
    position INTEGER,  -- Order in chain
    parameters JSON,
    FOREIGN KEY (chain_id) REFERENCES effect_chains(id)
);
```

Implementation:
```python
class EffectsChainEngine:
    def __init__(self, db_connection):
        self.db = db_connection
        self.ableton = AbletonInterface()
        
    def get_effect_chain(self, track_type, genre, mood):
        # Query database for appropriate effect chain
        query = """SELECT * FROM effect_chains 
                  WHERE track_type = ? AND genre = ? AND mood = ?
                  ORDER BY relevance DESC LIMIT 1"""
        chain = self.db.execute(query, (track_type, genre, mood)).fetchone()
        
        # Get effects for this chain
        effects_query = """SELECT * FROM effect_parameters 
                         WHERE chain_id = ? ORDER BY position"""
        effects = self.db.execute(effects_query, (chain['id'],)).fetchall()
        
        return {'chain': chain, 'effects': effects}
        
    def apply_effects_to_track(self, track_id, track_type, genre, mood):
        chain_data = self.get_effect_chain(track_type, genre, mood)
        
        # Add each effect to the track in Ableton
        for effect in chain_data['effects']:
            self.ableton.add_effect(track_id, effect['effect_type'])
            self.ableton.set_effect_parameters(track_id, effect['effect_type'], effect['parameters'])
            
        return chain_data['chain']['id']
        
    def customize_effect_parameters(self, effect_params, track_analysis):
        # Adjust effect parameters based on track analysis
        # e.g., increase reverb for sparse tracks, add compression for dynamic tracks
        customized_params = effect_params.copy()
        
        # Apply track-specific customizations
        if track_analysis['density'] < 0.3:
            customized_params['reverb']['wet'] *= 1.5
            
        if track_analysis['dynamic_range'] > 20:
            customized_params['compressor']['threshold'] -= 3
            customized_params['compressor']['ratio'] += 1
            
        return customized_params
```

Utilize the existing Ableton Live integration to add and configure effects.

Include methods for detecting problematic frequencies, resonances, and masking issues between tracks.

Implement headroom management to prevent clipping and maintain -6dB peak headroom for mastering.

Include stereo width analysis, correlation checking, and intelligent placement algorithms that prevent masking. Consider mono compatibility and implement Haas effect for enhanced spatial perception.

subtasks.title: Develop adaptive EQ and frequency balance correction system

subtasks.details: Create frequency balance analyzer that compares mix spectrum to reference curves for different genres. Implement adaptive EQ that identifies and corrects frequency buildups, resonances, and gaps. Include dynamic EQ capabilities for frequency-dependent compression and surgical corrections.

Implement multiband compressor for frequency-specific dynamics control, stereo enhancer for width control, soft-knee limiter with look-ahead for transparent loudness maximization. Include dithering and sample rate conversion for final rendering at various quality levels (MP3, WAV, FLAC).

tasks.title: Implement Seed-Based Expansion System
tasks.description: Develop a system that can expand existing musical ideas (chord progressions, melodies) into complete 4-bar snippets and full songs.
tasks.details:
Create a seed-based expansion system that can take existing musical ideas and develop them into complete songs:

1. Implement MIDI parsing to extract musical information from seed content
2. Develop algorithms to analyze and understand the musical characteristics of seeds
3. Create expansion algorithms that generate complementary parts based on seeds
4. Build style matching to ensure generated content matches the seed's style
5. Implement variation generation for creating multiple versions from the same seed

Implementation:
```python
class SeedExpansionEngine:
    def __init__(self):
        self.midi_parser = MIDIParser()
        self.midi_generator = MIDIGenerationEngine()
        self.music_theory = MusicTheoryEngine()
        
    def parse_seed(self, midi_data, seed_type='melody'):
        # Extract musical information from seed MIDI
        parsed = self.midi_parser.parse(midi_data)
        
        # Analyze musical characteristics
        key = self.music_theory.detect_key(parsed['notes'])
        rhythm_pattern = self.music_theory.analyze_rhythm(parsed['notes'])
        density = len(parsed['notes']) / parsed['duration']
        
        if seed_type == 'chord':
            chords = self.music_theory.extract_chords(parsed['notes'])
            progression = self.music_theory.analyze_progression(chords, key)
            return {
                'type': 'chord',
                'key': key,
                'progression': progression,
                'rhythm': rhythm_pattern,
                'duration': parsed['duration']
            }
        else:  # melody
            contour = self.music_theory.analyze_contour(parsed['notes'])
            intervals = self.music_theory.analyze_intervals(parsed['notes'])
            return {
                'type': 'melody',
                'key': key,
                'contour': contour,
                'intervals': intervals,
                'rhythm': rhythm_pattern,
                'density': density,
                'duration': parsed['duration']
            }
        
    def expand_chord_seed(self, seed_data, style_prompt):
        # Generate complementary tracks based on chord seed
        style = self.midi_generator.analyze_prompt(style_prompt)
        
        # Use the seed's chord progression to generate other parts
        bass = self.generate_bass_from_chords(seed_data['progression'], style)
        melody = self.generate_melody_from_chords(seed_data['progression'], style)
        drums = self.generate_drums_for_style(style, seed_data['rhythm'])
        
        return {
            'chords': seed_data['progression'],  # Original seed
            'bass': bass,
            'melody': melody,
            'drums': drums
        }
        
    def expand_melody_seed(self, seed_data, style_prompt):
        # Generate complementary tracks based on melody seed
        style = self.midi_generator.analyze_prompt(style_prompt)
        
        # Derive chord progression that fits the melody
        chords = self.music_theory.derive_chords_from_melody(
            seed_data['notes'], seed_data['key']
        )
        
        # Generate other parts based on derived chords and original melody
        bass = self.generate_bass_from_chords(chords, style)
        drums = self.generate_drums_for_style(style, seed_data['rhythm'])
        
        return {
            'melody': seed_data,  # Original seed
            'chords': chords,
            'bass': bass,
            'drums': drums
        }
        
    def generate_variations(self, seed_data, count=3):
        # Generate multiple variations of the seed
        variations = []
        
        for i in range(count):
            if seed_data['type'] == 'chord':
                # Vary rhythm, voicing, or add passing chords
                variation = self.music_theory.vary_chord_progression(
                    seed_data['progression'],
                    variation_type=['rhythm', 'voicing', 'passing'][i % 3]
                )
            else:  # melody
                # Vary rhythm, contour, or ornamentation
                variation = self.music_theory.vary_melody(
                    seed_data,
                    variation_type=['rhythm', 'contour', 'ornament'][i % 3]
                )
                
            variations.append(variation)
            
        return variations
```

Utilize the existing MIDI processing system and music theory engine.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Unit tests for seed parsing (verify correct extraction of musical information)
2. Integration tests for expansion (verify complementary parts match the seed)
3. Test with different seed types (melody, chord progression, rhythm)
4. Test with different style prompts (verify style matching)
5. Musical coherence testing (verify expanded parts work together)
6. Test variation generation (verify variations maintain core musical identity)
7. Performance testing (expansion should complete within 1 minute)
8. Test with edge cases (very short seeds, complex harmonies, unusual rhythms)

subtasks.title: Implement MIDI Parser for Seed Content
subtasks.description: Create a robust MIDI parsing system that can extract and analyze musical information from seed MIDI files, including notes, timing, velocity, and other MIDI events.
subtasks.details: Build upon the existing MIDIParser class to extract comprehensive musical data from seed content. This includes parsing note events, timing information, velocity dynamics, control changes, and program changes. The parser should handle both single-track and multi-track MIDI files, identifying the primary musical content (melody or chords) and extracting relevant musical features for analysis.
subtasks.testStrategy: Create unit tests with various MIDI file types (melody seeds, chord seeds, complex arrangements) and verify correct extraction of notes, timing, velocity, and other MIDI events. Test edge cases like empty tracks, unusual time signatures, and malformed MIDI data.

subtasks.title: Develop Musical Characteristic Analysis System
subtasks.description: Build algorithms to analyze and understand the musical characteristics of parsed seeds, including key detection, rhythm patterns, harmonic progressions, and melodic contours.
subtasks.details: Implement comprehensive analysis algorithms within the MusicTheoryEngine to detect key signatures, analyze rhythm patterns and groove, identify chord progressions, analyze melodic contours and intervals, calculate note density and phrase structure, and detect stylistic patterns. The system should differentiate between melody and chord seeds and extract appropriate characteristics for each type.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test with known musical examples where key, rhythm, and harmonic content are well-defined. Verify accuracy of key detection, chord progression analysis, rhythm pattern recognition, and melodic contour analysis. Compare results against music theory ground truth.

subtasks.title: Create Expansion Algorithms for Complementary Parts
subtasks.description: Develop algorithms that generate musically coherent complementary parts (bass, melody, drums, harmony) based on the analyzed seed characteristics.
subtasks.details: Implement generation algorithms that create bass lines following chord progressions and maintaining stylistic consistency, generate melodies that complement chord seeds or harmonize with melody seeds, create drum patterns that match the rhythmic feel and style, and develop harmony parts that enrich the musical texture. The algorithms should respect the original seed's musical characteristics while adding creative variations.
subtasks.testStrategy: Generate complementary parts for various seed types and styles, then evaluate musical coherence, stylistic consistency, and harmonic compatibility. Use both automated metrics (harmony checking, rhythm alignment) and manual review of generated parts.

subtasks.title: Build Style Matching and Consistency System
subtasks.description: Implement a system that ensures generated content matches the seed's musical style and maintains consistency throughout the expansion process.
subtasks.details: Create a style analysis and matching system that extracts stylistic features from both the seed and style prompt, maintains consistency in instrumentation, tempo, and feel, adapts generation parameters based on detected style (e.g., jazz voicings, rock power chords), and ensures smooth transitions between seed content and generated parts. The system should handle style blending when the prompt suggests a different style than the seed.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test with seeds from various musical genres (jazz, rock, classical, electronic) and verify that expanded content maintains stylistic integrity. Evaluate consistency of instrumentation, harmony, rhythm patterns, and overall musical feel.

subtasks.title: Implement Variation Generation System
subtasks.description: Create a system for generating multiple variations of the same seed, providing creative alternatives while maintaining the core musical identity.
subtasks.details: Develop variation algorithms that can modify rhythm patterns while preserving groove, create chord voicing variations and substitutions, add passing chords and harmonic embellishments, vary melodic contours through ornamentation and rhythmic displacement, and generate multiple arrangement options from the same seed. The system should produce musically distinct yet related variations that offer creative choices to users.
subtasks.testStrategy: Generate multiple variations for the same seed and verify that each variation is musically distinct yet recognizably related to the original. Test variation quality across different musical styles and seed types. Ensure variations maintain musical coherence and stylistic consistency.

tasks.title: Implement Rhythm-Focused Pattern Generation
tasks.description: Develop specialized algorithms for generating genre-specific rhythm patterns, drum fills, and groove variations in 4-bar units.

2. Integration tests with drum fills (verify smooth transitions)
3. Test groove application (verify timing and velocity variations)

subtasks.testStrategy: Analyze the interplay between generated bass and drum patterns across various genres and complexity levels.

subtasks.title: Develop 4-Bar Pattern Sequencing System

subtasks.details: Implement a new method in RhythmPatternEngine that combines drum patterns, fills, and bass patterns into 4-bar sequences. Include logic for creating build-ups, breakdowns, and smooth transitions between different intensity levels.
subtasks.testStrategy: Generate multiple 4-bar sequences and evaluate their musical coherence and effectiveness in creating dynamic rhythm progressions.

tasks.title: Develop Complete End-to-End Pipeline
tasks.description: Integrate all components into a complete end-to-end pipeline that takes a text prompt and produces a finished song with professional quality.
tasks.details:
Create a unified pipeline that integrates all components into a seamless end-to-end system:

1. Implement the main controller class that orchestrates all components
2. Develop a unified API for accepting text prompts and returning completed songs
3. Create progress tracking and error handling throughout the pipeline
4. Implement caching for intermediate results to improve performance
5. Build output options for different file formats and project files
6. Integrate all existing components: MIDI generation, VST matching, effects, mixing, etc.

Implementation:
```python
class AISongGenerationPipeline:
    def __init__(self):
        # Initialize all component engines
        self.midi_engine = MIDIGenerationEngine()
        self.snippet_engine = SnippetAssemblyEngine()
        self.vst_matcher = VSTMatcher(db_connection)
        self.effects_engine = EffectsChainEngine(db_connection)
        self.mixing_engine = AIMixingEngine()
        self.seed_engine = SeedExpansionEngine()
        self.rhythm_engine = RhythmPatternEngine()
        self.ableton = AbletonInterface()
        
    def generate_song(self, prompt, options=None):
        # Default options
        if options is None:
            options = {
                'length': 'medium',
                'output_format': 'wav',
                'include_project': True,
                'seed': None
            }
            
        # Track progress
        progress = {'status': 'starting', 'progress': 0}
        
        try:
            # 1. Analyze prompt
            progress.update({'status': 'analyzing_prompt', 'progress': 5})
            params = self.midi_engine.analyze_prompt(prompt)
            
            # 2. Generate song structure
            progress.update({'status': 'generating_structure', 'progress': 10})
            if options['seed']:
                # Use seed-based expansion
                seed_data = self.seed_engine.parse_seed(options['seed'])
                expanded = self.seed_engine.expand_seed(seed_data, prompt)
                project_id = self.snippet_engine.assemble_from_expanded(expanded, params, options['length'])
            else:
                # Generate from scratch
                project_id = self.snippet_engine.assemble_song(prompt, options['length'])
                
            # 3. Apply virtual instruments
            progress.update({'status': 'applying_instruments', 'progress': 30})
            tracks = self.ableton.get_tracks(project_id)
            for track in tracks:
                self.vst_matcher.apply_vst_to_track(
                    track['id'], track['midi_data'], params['genre'], params['mood']
                )
                
            # 4. Apply effects
            progress.update({'status': 'applying_effects', 'progress': 50})
            for track in tracks:
                self.effects_engine.apply_effects_to_track(
                    track['id'], track['type'], params['genre'], params['mood']
                )
                
            # 5. Mix and master
            progress.update({'status': 'mixing', 'progress': 70})
            track_analysis = self.mixing_engine.analyze_tracks(project_id)
            self.mixing_engine.balance_volumes(project_id, track_analysis)
            self.mixing_engine.apply_panning(project_id)
            self.mixing_engine.apply_master_chain(project_id)
            
            # 6. Render output
            progress.update({'status': 'rendering', 'progress': 90})
            output_path = f"output/{uuid.uuid4()}.{options['output_format']}"
            audio_file = self.mixing_engine.render_final_audio(project_id, output_path)
            
            # 7. Save project file if requested
            project_file = None
            if options['include_project']:
                project_file = self.ableton.save_project(project_id, f"output/{uuid.uuid4()}.als")
                
            progress.update({'status': 'complete', 'progress': 100})
            
            return {
                'status': 'success',
                'audio_file': audio_file,
                'project_file': project_file,
                'parameters': params
            }
            
        except Exception as e:
            progress.update({'status': 'error', 'error': str(e)})
            return {'status': 'error', 'error': str(e)}
            
    def get_progress(self):
        # Return current progress information
        return progress
```

Integrate with all previously developed components and the existing Ableton Live integration.

1. End-to-end integration tests (verify complete pipeline works)

8. Stress testing with complex prompts and edge cases

subtasks.title: Design and Implement Main Pipeline Controller

Design the class structure to support extensibility and modularity. Include proper dependency injection patterns and configuration management. Ensure thread-safe operation for concurrent requests.

subtasks.title: Develop Unified API and Progress Tracking

Include options for output format, length, seed data, and other parameters. Implement progress tracking system with granular status updates at each pipeline stage.
subtasks.testStrategy: API endpoint tests with various input scenarios. WebSocket connection tests for progress updates. Load testing for concurrent requests. Validation tests for malformed inputs.

subtasks.title: Implement Caching and Performance Optimization

subtasks.details: Design multi-level caching strategy for MIDI patterns, VST presets, effect chains, and rendered audio segments. Implement cache invalidation logic based on prompt similarity and time. Use Redis or similar for distributed caching. Include memory management to prevent cache overflow. Add cache warming strategies for common patterns.
subtasks.testStrategy: Performance benchmarks comparing cached vs non-cached operations. Cache hit/miss ratio analysis. Memory usage tests under various load scenarios. Consistency tests for cache invalidation.

subtasks.title: Build Error Handling and Recovery System

subtasks.details: Implement try-catch blocks at each pipeline stage with specific error types. Design fallback strategies for component failures (e.g., default VST if matcher fails). Add retry logic with exponential backoff for transient errors. Create detailed error logging and user-friendly error messages. Include partial result recovery to salvage work from failed pipelines.
subtasks.testStrategy: Fault injection tests at each pipeline stage. Recovery mechanism tests with simulated failures. Error message clarity tests. Logging completeness verification.

subtasks.title: Create Output Management and Format Support

subtasks.details: Support multiple output formats (WAV, MP3, FLAC, OGG) with configurable quality settings. Implement Ableton Live project file export (.als) with all tracks, effects, and automation. Create stem export functionality for individual tracks. Add metadata embedding (title, artist, prompt used). Implement file management system with unique naming, cleanup policies, and storage optimization.
